title.rendered: Where to find toy manufacturing in China

content.rendered:
China toys manufacturing is located in Chenghai District, Shantou City, Guangdong Province. It is home to almost 80% of China toys manufacturers. Generally, the buyers call China toys directly Shantou toys or Chenghai toys.

We know that the Yiwu toys wholesale market is the largest toys wholesale market in China. When you wholesale toys from China, the Yiwu toy market is the best place for you. Because you can buy many different styles of toys in the same store and the MOQ is as low as 1 carton and the price is cheap.

But if you want to find toy manufacturing in China, or buy directly from China toys factories or manufacturers, Shantou is you must visit the place. 

Who should import toys from Shantou?

#1. For the big buyers or importers, who want to import toys directly from the toys factories of china manufacturers.

#2. People can purchase toys with more than three cartons for each model.

#3. The importer can buy a whole container of toys.

#4. People who want to custom their own toy’s packing or customize toys. 

#5. People like supermarkets or big retailers who want to purchase more styles of toys.

For the above people who want to come to China to sourcing toys, then Shantou Chenghai is the place you must go to import toys from China. 

How to find China toys manufacturers in Shantou

China toys manufacturing is in Shantou, and China toy manufacturers could be found in the toy exhibition hall, also known as the toy showroom. There are many different toy exhibition halls in Chenghai, each displaying thousands of different toys from different factories.

What’s the toy exhibition hall？ The toy exhibition hall is where toys from all the different toy factories are displayed, all on the shelves, just like a supermarket. The toy exhibition hall is the place showing all the toys from the different China toy manufacturers. And all the toys are displaying on the shelves, just like a supermarket.

Because of the toy exhibition hall, finding a China toy factory is as easy as visiting a supermarket for toy import importers. Because of all the toys displayed here, you can view all the information, including product information, price, factory information, etc.

Top 5 exhibition halls in Shantou

There are many toy exhibition halls in Shantou. But not every hall is worth visiting. We only need to know the top 5 toy halls, because, through these 5 halls, you can find almost all Shantou toy manufacturers.

#1. HOTON TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

Hoton Toys exhibition hall is one of Shantou’s biggest toys showrooms and is the most popular one. It has more than 15,000 square meters showing area, Showing 270,000+ toys, also most importantly, you can find 5000+ toys manufacturers here.

As the toys buyer or importer, here you can enjoy the best service. When you are hungry, they will help you prepare food; when you are tired, they will prepare a lounge for you; if you want to drink some wine, they can even help you prepare dozens of different types of wine for you to drink.

#2. CBH TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

CBH toys exhibition hall also is a must-visit place if you want to find toys manufacturers. It has more than 13,000 square meters showing area, showing 250,000+ toys. Also, you can select your interested toys and check the factory detail from the staff.

#3. ON TOP TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

On Top toys exhibition hall is the earliest toy showroom in Shantou, most toys from different toy manufacturers are showing here. It has a 16,000 square meters showing area, showing 290,000+ toys, and also you can find out more than 6000+ toy factories here.

#4. YS WIN-WIN TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

YS Win-Win toys exhibition hall is the best service toys showrooms in Shantou. It has more than 16,000 square meters showing area, showing 240,000+ toys. And you can find all kinds of toys from more than 6,000+ exhibiting toys factories. Even if you need, the factories can come to communicate with you about the toy business.

#5. HK TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

HK toys exhibition hall also is the most popular toys showroom in Shantou. It has more than 12,000 square meters showing area, showing 180,000+ toys. And you can find more than 5,000+ toys factories here.

What’s inside of the exhibition hall

The toy exhibition hall is like a big supermarket, which holds countless shelves with many toys displayed on the shelves. In addition to several floors of the large exhibition hall, each floor of the hall has a bar where you can rest, drink coffee, etc.

There are lounges on each floor where you can rest and wait when you are tired, or when you finish your work, and the staff will give you a quotation sheet with factory information and prices.

Of course, if you want to enter the showroom, you must be accompanied by an interpreter or toy buying agent. Because the showroom staff basically does not speak English, there will be a big problem in communication if you go there by yourself.

How to find toy manufacturers in China online

You can find Chinese toy manufacturers by searching Google for keywords, like “beach toy manufacturers in China”. Of course, you can Alibaba search for China toy factories. These are not the most effective. The most effective and direct way to find toy manufacturers is through an online toy exhibition hall.

Due to COVID-19, many buyers cannot come to China to purchase toys. This becomes very difficult for them to find toy suppliers. 

Shantou Toy Showroom has made its toy and manufacturer resources into a website so that people can select toys and get quotations and factory information directly from the website. This makes importing toys from China much easier.

Just like shopping online, you can search for toy keywords to find the toy you want, like “beach toys”. Of course, you can also use image search to find the same or similar toys. Finally, add the toys you are interested in into your shopping cart and submit an offer in the shopping cart. The staff will give you a complete quote within 24 hours.

What are the toy companies in China?

In Shantou, in addition to toy exhibition halls, many toy companies will also have toy showrooms. Of course these toy showrooms you can also pick up a large number of toys and get quotes. But you can’t get direct information about toy manufacturers because they are the wholesaler. 

However, these toy companies have a better price because they have been cooperating with toy factories for a long time, and they can provide one-stop sourcing services, including quotation, order placement, receiving, inspection, container loading and shipping. These are things that toy exhibition halls cannot do, because they just supply quotation to you.

Top 5 China toys company

#1. MK Toys company

MK Toys, located in Chenghai, is one of the largest toy suppliers in China. They have over 10,000 square meters of showroom, you can pick and get a quote directly from their toy showroom. They will contact you and give you a quote.

#2. Poxst Service

Poxst Service is one of the most professional wholesale toy suppliers and professional toy sourcing agents in China. They don’t have their own independent showroom, they all take you to the toy exhibition hall to pick samples and help you get the lowest price with the factory.

Unlike other toy companies, they only charge a commission and do not make a difference from the product. So if you want to buy toys directly from Chinese toy manufacturers and get the lowest price, they are your best choice.

#3. HangWing Toys company

HangWing Toys is also like the Mk toys company, they have big toys showroom and showing lots of toys. Also, you can buy directly from them, but you better need to compare the prices as they may be higher.

#4. Bigtree Toys company

Big Tree Toys Co. is located in Chenghai, Shantou, with a total area of 23,000㎡and 30,000㎡ building area. We own the largest showroom in Shantou which covers an area of over 15,000 m2. The showroom displays more than 50 kinds of toys category with nearly 1,000,000 products.

#5. Huada Toys company

Huada Toys is also one of the largest toy companies in China. It is also a Chinese toy company with manufacturing factories. They have a 15,000 square meters showroom displaying 1.9 million different types of toys.

Above is all information about finding a China toys manufacturer. If you still have questions or need more help, you can leave a message or contact us.
